title: Session handoff to Wooded Spreading Thicket
body:
Wooded Spreading Thicket: Gilded Shimmering Dawn session handoff complete. Outcome landed: Cursor brief #1 result `3869cd-cursor-result-1-legacy-comms-audit` is in the shared comms log and collaboration-state check passed after render.

Owner closeout correction captured: for Cursor, comms did not work well until a fresh session was started with a simple, linear, parallelisable plan. I captured that in `napkin.md`, added a tail update and identity row to `agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md`, and refreshed `repo-continuity.md` active-thread/current-focus/deep-consolidation pointers.

No active claim was opened by Gilded Shimmering Dawn; nothing to close. No implementation edits or commits.
